erstelle.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] This creates a new ~l:date~ item in the supplied container - usually a ~l:div|k|browser~ - and initialized with the given values.

datum.description:
[Übersetzung in Arbeit] This declares a ~m:<date>~ variable. You can create a new ~m:date~ element with ~l:create~.

A ~m:date~ is a compound component consisting of 3 fields, for year, month and day. The component handles its own interactions, adjusting itself for months of different lengths and also for leap years.

setze.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] This sets the value of the ~m:date~ component to the timestamp given. Timestamps are the number of seconds since January 1, 1970 (the Unix epoch).
setze.examples: setze StartDate zu jetzt%0asetze FinishDate zu FutureDate

zeitstempel von.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] Converts the date currently held by the ~l:date|k~ component to a Unit timestamp.
zeitstempel von.examples: lege der/die/das/den/dem/des zeitstempel von IssueDate zu SomeDate

datum von.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] Converts the date currently held by the ~l:date|k~ component to a text string of the form "{day} {month} {year}", for example "15 July 2014".
datum von.examples: lege der/die/das/den/dem/des datum von ActionDate in Buffer

erstelle.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] This creates a new ~m:date~ item in the supplied container - usually a ~l:div|k|browser~ - initialized with the given values.

datum.description: [Übersetzung in Arbeit] This declares a ~m:<date>~ variable. You can create a new ~m:date~ element with ~l:create~.
